section.heading: Student support

paragraph.content: require a biannual survey of midshipmen, faculty, and staff of the Academy assessing the environment of the Academy; and
require an annual survey of faculty and staff of the Academy assessing the Sea Year program.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 117–263, div. C, title XXXV, § 3531(a), Dec. 23, 2022, 136 Stat. 3087.)

note.heading: United States Merchant Marine Academy Student Support Plan
